candidates.why: This is an explicit separate operating expense line at the same level as Payroll expenses, Other operating expenses, and Selling exp., and outside the selected XSGA component rows. It therefore appears to be D&A that should be added separately to the XSGA bucket. It is also the best summary row, so it is preferred over more granular component labels.
